itemListElement.reviewBody: I love the school atmosphere and it looks very pleasant, the staffs were very friendly and kind according to my discipline. But the students attitude is very worst and doesn't show some feelings and responsibility they always show off for something to the other students and they don't obey what teachers say. Dr. Anbazahgan Sir the CEO and Chairman is humble to the kids and staffs he shows simplicity to others what the staffs be like. Well I can rate 3/5 for this school experience.

Teachers some are really good and guide the children well.  But school is open to feedback .
Teachers stay back to aid learners.
Infrastructure is good . Coming personally from.a background of teachers , I can say that with a little more effort they can do wonders.

I must split the rating based on 4 categories:
1. Top Management,
2. School Infrastructure,
3. School Teachers,
4. Other staffs
5. Logistics

1. Thiru. Vetriazhagan sir, a simple, humble person whose dreams are good on keeping a single school and wants to see it shine. His vision is excellent. But, sorry to say that they aren't ready to listen to the constructive voices of parents, where the Principal madam is never a type to receive criticisms and suggestions. So I will rate 3 stars here.

2. School infrastructure is good for what a child basically needs. A good point to note is the sports for my son who is studying 3rd standard. A sound mind needs a sound body and am very much pleased with the way classes are arranged, especially by the teachers Ms.Malathy (Hindi), Ms.Uma (Math) and Ms.Hiranmayi (Social, English & basic behaviour). However, the Project Display event is like a market auction, where everything is dumped and packed like 10 chickens in a coup. The rest is great. So I will rate 3 stars for that.

3. School Teachers are not to be blamed, for they give their best for the education and am very much contented with their teaching. But a teacher becomes a real role model, if they realize the strengths and weaknesses of his/her pupil, mold and make them ambassadors of their schools. My son who scored in Olympiad exams haven't received his certificate yet for the last academic year and they make us roam to get it. Improper communication about the school events to the parents is another issue, though we never delay in paying the fees. Very few teachers namely Ms.Bommi, Ms.Elsa, Ms.Latha, Ms.Priya, Ms.Tamilselvi, especially Ms.Bala who motivates my son with tiny gifts are found to be the best and we are really grateful to them. So I shall rate them 4 stars.

4. School bus driver is the best amidst all staffs. He is kind, attentive and very much caring. The care taking granny too is quite good with kids. The PET sirs, are really very responsive and caring. But the admin staffs aren't responsible to the queries. However, we cannot blame them, as they are the ones who are pressurized to handle multiple tasks. The Security is very responsible with their jobs too. So I shall rate them 5 stars.

5. On the basis of the logistics, the School Uniforms, books are partially given after 2 months of Academic year; ID Cards and other amenities are mostly provided after half of the year. So, I shall rate them as 2 stars.

I am Aroan Jeffery  and I am a student of this school. Compared with many other school , our school is unique in features and the staffs here are nice and friendly . The infrastructures here are quite good and the school has a good atmosphere . Talents of students are not wasted and the staff teaches us in a better way of understanding and they put some efforts for those who cannot understand the lessons. Overall this is the best school I ever seen .

One of the Best school in this Location. Comparing the near by schools Dawn is the good one for students. These students are not bookworm. Students communication skills are very good, some  famous schools students are not in this level of communication. Safest environment.  Most of the students who left from this school  to other school they really wants to come back. My children are studying for the last 10 years happily.  Stress less study method , effort full teachers,  kindness management.
